mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day forward returns show negative mean or Rank IC below 0.02 during rate decline periods over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.5 percentage points signals sudden labor market deterioration, triggering immediate negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns remain positive in more than 55 percent of instances where UNRATE rises above the threshold, or signal shows no statistical significance in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates broad-based consumer demand recovery, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative 60-day returns in more than 60 percent of triggered cases, or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during a late-cycle expansion reflects capacity utilization tightening, which compresses equity risk premiums and yields positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses to negative during late-cycle expansions, or 20-day forward returns are not significantly positive when INDPRO trends upward in this regime.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly inflation surge above 0.4 percent forces markets to price in aggressive monetary tightening, causing immediate negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in more than 50 percent of high-inflation months, or the signal loses predictive power when CPIAUCSL MoM exceeds the threshold over a 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising total nonfarm payrolls and falling unemployment rates confirms robust labor market absorption, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields negative 60-day returns in more than 55 percent of cases, or the interaction effect vanishes when controlling for GDP growth in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP contractions during a recessionary regime trigger earnings downgrades and liquidity hoarding, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the subsequent 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward 20-day returns remain positive during GDP contraction quarters, or the negative signal fails to achieve a Rank IC above 0.05 in recession periods.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly drop in industrial production exceeding 1.0 percent signals acute supply-side disruption, triggering immediate negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns are positive in more than 60 percent of instances where INDPRO falls below the threshold, or the threshold signal shows no out-of-sample predictive accuracy.
